name: Hexa Path Fill
shortDescription: HexaFill is a polished hex-grid path fill puzzle game where players drag from start points to fill paths across a hexagonal grid, solving puzzles by correctly connecting routes without overlap or dead ends.
fullDescription:
HexaFill is a polished hex-grid path fill puzzle game designed for puzzle enthusiasts. Players drag from start points to fill paths across a hexagonal grid, solving puzzles by correctly connecting routes without overlap or dead ends. The gameplay is intuitive yet scalable, making it suitable for a wide audience.

Enjoy 1000 challenging levels with a data-driven system for endless fun.

🎮 Core Gameplay

  • Hexagonal grid with 6-direction neighbor logic
  • Path drawing with multiple colored routes
  • Solved-path validation system
  • Auto reset for incomplete or incorrect paths

🧠 Game Systems

  • Hint system
  • Skip level
  • Reset level
  • Tutorial system with animated guidance
  • Level progression and repeat-level logic

🎨 UI & UX

  • Gameplay HUD (level text, buttons, toggles)
  • Settings (Music, SFX, Vibration)
  • Toast notifications
  • Privacy policy button

🔊 Audio & Feedback

  • Background music + sound effects
  • Melodic feedback while drawing paths
  • Mobile haptic feedback

✨ Visual Polish

  • Level start animation (wave placement)
  • Level completion animations
